title: hydrocharis stolonifera
intro: Hydrocharis stolonifera, also known as the frog-bit or water dewflower, is a semi-aquatic plant that belongs to the family Hydrocharitaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Hydrocharis stolonifera include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
